urdu transliteration text:
AY GHAREEB E ZAHRA, AY MERE BHAI HUSSAIN
MERE MAZLOOM HUSSAIN
english translation text: O poor son of Zahra, O my brother Hussain (A.S)

urdu transliteration text: DASHT E GHURBAT ME YEHI EK BEHAN KI HAI SADA
english translation text: In the desert of Karbala, this is the cry of a sister

urdu transliteration text: AY GHAREEB E ZAHRA, AY MERE BHAI HUSSAIN
english translation text: O poor son of Zahra, O my brother Hussain (A.S)

urdu transliteration text: MERE MAZLOOM HUSSAIN, AY MERE BHAI HUSSAIN
english translation text: O my oppressed Hussain (A.S), O my brother Hussain (A.S)

urdu transliteration text: DHOOP ME JISNE KABHI NA NIKALA THA TUJHE
english translation text: Someone who never took you out (of the house) in the scorching heat..

urdu transliteration text: CHAKIYAAN PEES KE IS MA NE PALA THA TUJHE
english translation text: The mother who nourished you (with her own hands) by grinding wheat…

urdu transliteration text: USKI AAGHOSH ME HI ZIBHA TU PYASA HUWA
english translation text: You were slaughtered thirsty in her very own laps

urdu transliteration text: ILTEJA KARTI RAHI USNE MERI NA SUNI
english translation text: I kept pleading with him but he did not pay heed

urdu transliteration text: SHIMR KE HAATH ME JAB HAYE ZULFEIN THI'N TERI
english translation text: When Shimr held your head by the hair in his hands

urdu transliteration text: YEH BEHAN ROTI RAHI AUR WO HANSTA RAHA
english translation text: This sister kept crying, while he kept laughing

urdu transliteration text:
YAAD ATA HAI BOHOT AAJ GHURBAT ME WATAN
Being a stranger today, I remember my home town
DOOR PARDES ME HUM LUT GAYE BHAI BEHAN
english translation text: Far from our homes, this sister along with her brother has been looted

urdu transliteration text: DU TUJHE KAISE KAFAN AB NAHIN SAR PE RIDA
english translation text: How do I enshroud you, there is no longer a veil on my head

urdu transliteration text: TERE MAQTAL ME MERI ZINDAGI KHATM HUWII
english translation text: On your battlefield, my life ended

urdu transliteration text: TU JO KHAIME SE GAYA MARGAYI BINTE ALI
english translation text: As you left the tents, my life ended

urdu transliteration text: ME BHI KHAIME ME GIRI ZIN SE TU JO GIRA
english translation text: I fell on the ground, as you fell off your horse

urdu transliteration text: SAR PE JO HAATH RAKHE AB NAHIN AISA KOI
english translation text: There is no one that will put their hands on our heads

urdu transliteration text: PHIR YATEEM AAJ HUWI SAANI E BINTE ALI
english translation text: The daughter of Ali has become an orphan once again

urdu transliteration text: TUJHKO BABA KI TARHA MAINE SAMJHA THA SADA
english translation text: I used to look up to you as a father figure

urdu transliteration text: BERIDA KAISE BHALA MONH DIKHAWUNGI UNHEI
english translation text: How will I show my uncovered face to him

urdu transliteration text: WOH JO POOCHENGE TERA KYA BATAUNGI UNHE
english translation text: When he asks about you, what will I say to him

urdu transliteration text: SHAME ASHOOR KO JAB AAENGE SHERE KHUDA
english translation text: On the evening after ashoor, when the lion of god arrives

urdu transliteration text: THI TAKALLUM WOH BHALA KAISI GHURBAT KI GHARI
english translation text: ‘Takallum’, it was indeed a difficult moment

urdu transliteration text: NAZA ME BINTE ALI ROKE YE KEHTI RAHI
english translation text: In her final breaths, the daughter of Ali repeatedly said

urdu transliteration text: HAYE JEE BHAR KE TERA MUJHSE MATAM NA HUWA
english translation text: I was not able to weep and lament over you as I had wished
